summary: Verified the OBSERVACIONES box bug fix in signed PDF. Created deliveries via API with/without/long notes, signed them, downloaded signed PDFs, and inspected text positions using pypdf. All scenarios behaved as specified: OBSERVACIONES box appears above RECIBIDO Y FIRMADO when notes exist, is hidden when notes empty, and is clamped to 3 wrapped lines for long text. Frontend loads correctly and shows the OBSERVACIONES input field.
passed: POST /api/deliveries/{id}/sign generates signed PDF including OBSERVACIONES box
OBSERVACIONES text rendered with provided notes content
OBSERVACIONES box is positioned ABOVE RECIBIDO Y FIRMADO (y=239 vs y=166)
Notes text 'Material entregado en perfecto estado...' present and word-wrapped
When notes is empty string, OBSERVACIONES box is NOT rendered (verified)
Long notes (>3 wrapped lines) are clamped to max 3 lines (4th line truncated)
RECIBIDO Y FIRMADO box, receiver name, and timestamp all still rendered correctly
Existing reference delivery 1f194ea9-... exists and is_signed=true with expected notes
Frontend home loads with OBSERVACIONES textarea input visible
notes: Visual color (#1E8E3E green ~ RGB 0.118/0.557/0.243) and 2px green border are set in code but text extraction cannot verify visual styling; structural/positional verification confirmed via pypdf visitor_text coordinates. Reference delivery and three additional test deliveries were created during testing.
